mapper.sql: id, dr_no, idempotent_key, source, trade_order_id, super_ticket_no, so_no, order_status, contact_name_c, contact_name_md5, contact_phone_c, contact_phone_md5,contact_gender, test_tag, first_response_tag, finish_tag, responsible, risk_level, complaint_type, operator_position_id, operator_mid, customer_service_mid, zone_id, little_zone_id, city_zone_id, city_id, org_id, problem_category, problem_desc, last_category_id, complaint_scene, last_complaint_scene_id, reminder_times, last_reminder_time, reassignment_times, last_reassignment_time, expected_first_response_time, real_first_response_time, expected_finish_time, real_finish_time, create_time, update_time, create_mid

dr_no, contact_name_c, contact_phone_c, complaint_type, order_status, update_time, risk_level, problem_category, problem_desc, reminder_times, expected_first_response_time, expected_finish_time, operator_mid, org_id

dr_no, source, trade_order_id, customer_service_mid, super_ticket_no, order_status, contact_name_c, contact_phone_c, contact_gender, risk_level, org_id, complaint_type, problem_category, problem_desc, reminder_times, reminder_flag, create_time, update_time, reassignment_times, operator_position_id, operator_mid, zone_id, little_zone_id, city_id, complaint_content, create_mid
mapper.insert: insert into deliver_retail_complaint_order (id, dr_no, idempotent_key, source, trade_order_id, super_ticket_no, so_no, order_status, contact_name_c, contact_name_md5, contact_phone_c, contact_phone_md5, test_tag, first_response_tag, finish_tag, responsible, risk_level, complaint_type, operator_position_id, operator_mid, customer_service_mid, zone_id, little_zone_id, city_zone_id, expected_first_response_time, real_first_response_time, expected_finish_time, real_finish_time, create_time, update_time, create_mid, complaint_content) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{drNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idempotentKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{source,jdbcType=BIT}, #{tradeOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{superTicketNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{soNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update deliver_retail_complaint_order
dr_no = #{drNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
idempotent_key = #{idempotentKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
source = #{source,jdbcType=BIT},
trade_order_id = #{tradeOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
super_ticket_no = #{superTicketNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
so_no = #{soNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_status = #{orderStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT},
contact_name_c = #{contactNameC,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
contact_name_md5 = #{contactNameMd5,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
contact_phone_c = #{contactPhoneC,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
contact_phone_md5 = #{contactPhoneMd5,jdbcType=CHAR},
test_tag = #{testTag,jdbcType=TINYINT},
first_response_tag = #{firstResponseTag,jdbcType=BIT},
finish_tag = #{finishTag,jdbcType=BIT},
responsible = #{responsible,jdbcType=BIT},
risk_level = #{riskLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
complaint_type = #{complaintType,jdbcType=BIT},
operator_position_id = #{operatorPositionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
operator_mid = #{operatorMid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
customer_service_mid = #{customerServiceMid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
zone_id = #{zoneId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
little_zone_id = #{littleZoneId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
city_zone_id = #{cityZoneId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
city_id = #{cityId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
org_id = #{orgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
problem_category = #{problemCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
problem_desc = #{problemDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
last_category_id = #{lastCategoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
complaint_scene = #{complaintScene,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
last_complaint_scene_id = #{lastComplaintSceneId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
reminder_times = #{reminderTimes,jdbcType=INTEGER},
last_reminder_time = #{lastReminderTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reassignment_times = #{reassignmentTimes,jdbcType=INTEGER},
last_reassignment_time = #{lastReassignmentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
expected_first_response_time = #{expectedFirstResponseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
real_first_response_time = #{realFirstResponseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
expected_finish_time = #{expectedFinishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
real_finish_time = #{realFinishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_mid = #{createMid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
complaint_content = #{complaintContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update deliver_retail_complaint_order set dr_no = #{drNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, idempotent_key = #{idempotentKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, source = #{source,jdbcType=BIT}, trade_order_id = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_mid = #{createMid,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

sql.if: AND ( (order_status IN (10, 15) AND expected_first_response_time BETWEEN NOW() AND NOW() + INTERVAL 1 HOUR) OR (order_status IN (20, 30) AND expected_finish_time BETWEEN NOW() AND NOW() + INTERVAL 1 DAY) )

mapper.select: SELECT count( 1 ) FROM deliver_retail_complaint_order o WHERE 1=1 and o.source = 1

select
from deliver_retail_complaint_order o WHERE 1=1 and o.source = 1
order by o.reminder_times desc,o.expected_first_response_time asc,o.expected_finish_time asc
SELECT o.id FROM complaint_follow_process o WHERE o.process_type = 'FIRST_RESPONSE' AND o.complaint_no = #{params.drNo}
mapper.update:
update deliver_retail_complaint_order
order_status = #{params.orderStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT},
reminder_times = #{params.reminderTimes,jdbcType=INTEGER},
reminder_flag = #{params.reminderFlag,jdbcType=TINYINT},
reassignment_times = #{params.reassignmentTimes,jdbcType=INTEGER},
last_reminder_time = #{params.lastReminderTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
real_first_response_time = #{params.realFirstResponseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
real_finish_time = #{params.realFinishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
expected_first_response_time = #{params.expectedResponseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
expected_finish_time = #{params.expectedFinishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
operator_mid = #{params.operatorMid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
operator_position_id = #{params.operatorPositionId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
zone_id = #{params.zoneId},
little_zone_id = #{params.littleZoneId},
city_id = #{params.cityId},
org_id = #{params.orgId},
first_response_tag = #{params.firstResponseTag},
finish_tag = #{params.finishTag},
where dr_no = #{params.drNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM deliver_retail_complaint_order WHERE source = 1 AND order_status = 10 AND expected_first_response_time BETWEEN NOW() AND DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR) order by id asc

SELECT
FROM deliver_retail_complaint_order WHERE source = 1 AND order_status IN (10, 15, 20, 30) AND expected_finish_time BETWEEN NOW() AND DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 12 HOUR) order by id asc
